name: Carbon
description: Neutral-cool grayscale theme with slate undertones. Developer-tool aesthetic inspired by Claude, VS Code, and Devin AI. Soft muted blue accent.

decorators.carbon-canvas: Background color using theme background token. Clean, minimal foundation.
decorators.carbon-glass: Glassmorphic panel with backdrop-filter blur(12px), semi-transparent surface background, 1px border. Use for nav bars, sidebars, floating panels.
decorators.carbon-input: Soft border with gentle focus ring using primary blue. Border transitions on focus.
decorators.carbon-card: Surface background, subtle border, 8px radius, hover shadow transition.
decorators.carbon-code: Monospace font, surface-raised background, subtle 3px left border accent in primary color.
decorators.carbon-bubble-user: Right-aligned message bubble with primary-tinted background for user messages.
decorators.carbon-bubble-ai: Left-aligned message bubble with surface background for AI responses.
decorators.carbon-fade-slide: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 12px to 0, 200ms ease-out.
decorators.carbon-skeleton: Loading placeholder with subtle pulse animation for skeleton states.

chat.description: Chat interface with conversation list sidebar and message thread. Anchored input at bottom.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with clean card styling.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Clean sections with subtle separators.

carbon-canvas.description: Background color using theme background token. Clean, minimal foundation.
carbon-canvas.intent: Use as the root page background to establish the clean, developer-focused foundation. Sets a neutral canvas for content.

carbon-glass.description: Glassmorphic panel with backdrop-filter blur(12px), semi-transparent surface background, 1px border. Use for nav bars, sidebars, floating panels.
carbon-glass.intent: Use for navigation surfaces and panels that float above the canvas. Provides subtle depth while maintaining the minimal aesthetic.

carbon-input.description: Soft border with gentle focus ring using primary blue. Border transitions on focus.
carbon-input.intent: Use for all form inputs to maintain the clean, professional input styling. Focus ring provides clear interaction feedback.

carbon-card.description: Surface background, subtle border, 8px radius, hover shadow transition.
carbon-card.intent: Use for content containers that need clear visual boundaries. The hover shadow provides subtle interactive feedback.

carbon-divider.intent: Use to create visual separation between content sections without heavy borders. Maintains the minimal, clean aesthetic.

carbon-code.description: Monospace font, surface-raised background, subtle 3px left border accent in primary color.
carbon-code.intent: Use for code blocks and inline code to provide a distinct developer-tool aesthetic. The left accent border ties code to the brand.

suggested_properties.font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', 'Source Code Pro', Menlo, monospace

carbon-bubble-user.description: Right-aligned message bubble with primary-tinted background for user messages.
carbon-bubble-user.intent: Use for user-authored messages in chat interfaces. The primary tint distinguishes user messages from AI responses.

carbon-bubble-ai.description: Left-aligned message bubble with surface background for AI responses.
carbon-bubble-ai.intent: Use for AI-generated messages in chat interfaces. The neutral surface background creates a calm, readable presentation.

carbon-fade-slide.description: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 12px to 0, 200ms ease-out.
carbon-fade-slide.intent: Use as the entrance animation for content appearing on page load or scroll. Provides subtle, professional motion.

carbon-skeleton.description: Loading placeholder with subtle pulse animation for skeleton states.
carbon-skeleton.intent: Use as a placeholder while content loads. The pulse animation communicates loading state without being distracting.
